---
title: "Writing Retreat Notes 2025"
description: "Personal notes on how to improve writing efficiency"
author: "Raymond Parcon"
date: "2026-07-13"
slug: "writing-effectively"
categories: ["Blog", "Writing", "Personal"]
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
execute:
  eval: false
draft: true
---

## Writing retreat notes

### Why do we have to do writing retreat?

**Accountability** partner helps with motivation 
If you need personal assistance on writing consultation [UGA Writing Center](https://www.libs.uga.edu/mlc/writing-center)

Protective of the writing time and balancing with rest

Alternating with different tasks for mental break

Write a concept paper, like an Abstract
